title: Chewy Norwegian Cheese Curds Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly and umami-rich dish featuring chewy cheese curds in a flavorful stir-fry sauce, perfect for mealtime.

ingredients.name: Cheese Curds
ingredients.notes: Can be found at specialty food stores or online

ingredients.name: Vegetable Oil
ingredients.notes: For cooking the curds and vegetables

ingredients.name: Green Onions (Scallions)
ingredients.notes: Chiffonade cut for garnish and added flavor

instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a wok or frying pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add cheese curds to the wok and stir for another minute.
Season with salt and continue stirring to evenly distribute seasoning.
Pour in soy sauce and cornstarch mixture, stir to combine well.
Garnish with chiffonade green onions before serving.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
